body:
APPROVE
Clean add-alongside Stage 2 implementation: AgentRunRuntime drops all durable knobs (correctly delegated to rcfg accessors), RunWithConfig assembles RunOptions and delegates to Run, and NewTestConfigForRun mirrors the existing NewTestConfigForLoop pattern. Bonus zero-value-rcfg panic test reinforces SD-024's sealed-construction invariant. No callers migrated, matching scope.
